positive: A vibrant, abstract mountain range silhouette against a stylized cosmic sunset gradient. The composition is centralized, featuring clean, geometric peaks and stylized flora silhouetted in the foreground. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, saturated magenta, electric teal, and burnt orange. The overall style should be minimalist, modern, and suitable for textile printing, mimicking linocut or screen-print aesthetics. Highly detailed, centered, vector illustration quality, strong negative space, dramatic lighting, flat design perspective.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, low resolution, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, poor composition, busy background, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyright, photorealism
